title: Thin-layer chromatography
summary: 9701 A Level TLC — Rf values, polarity, and separation technique.
learningObjectives: Use TLC to monitor reactions and purity.

simpleExplanation.title: Separation on a thin plate
simpleExplanation.summary: Components partition between stationary silica and mobile solvent. Less polar compounds travel further.

sections.content: **TLC** (37.1) is the simplest **analytical technique** in 37.x. Always quote **Rf to 2 d.p.** with solvent stated.
